Operation 'createNetwork' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full lifecycle and when to use it.

data.current_description: Create a new network.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new network for the authenticated user. Accepts network configuration via CreateNetworkRequest schema including name, description, and other network parameters. Returns the newly created Network object with assigned ID. The network is immediately available for use and can be populated with employee nodes.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version specifies what inputs are expected (CreateNetworkRequest schema), what is returned (Network object with ID), and clarifies the side effect (network becomes available for use). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full lifecycle and when to use it.

message: Operation 'updateNetwork' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, clarifies the response format, and indicates partial update support. data.current_description: Edit a previously created network. NetworkJSON is not included in the response.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing network's configuration by ID. Accepts network updates via CreateNetworkRequest schema. Returns the updated Network object with NetworkJSON excluded from the response. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, clarifies the response format, and indicates partial update support. This helps AI agents understand what parameters to provide and what to expect in return.

data.current_description: Delete a network by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a network and all associated data by ID. This operation cannot be undone. Returns a success confirmation. All employee nodes, relationships, and metrics associated with the network are removed.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks critical information about side effects. Enhanced version clarifies the permanent nature of deletion, specifies what data is affected, and indicates the response type. This is crucial for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'computeDiameter' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description defines the metric but lacks input/output details and practical context. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, clarifies the return type and unit (integer hops), and explains the metric's significance for understanding network structure. This helps AI agents understand when to use this metric and how to interpret results.

data.current_description: Measures the length of the longest shortest path across the network.
data.description_suggestion: Computes the network diameter, which measures the longest shortest path between any two nodes in the network. Accepts network configuration via NetworkMetricRequest schema. Returns the diameter value as an integer representing the maximum number of hops between any pair of nodes. This metric indicates network compactness and connectivity.
data.reasoning: Original description defines the metric but lacks input/output details and practical context. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, clarifies the return type and unit (integer hops), and explains the metric's significance for understanding network structure. This helps AI agents understand when to use this metric and how to interpret results.
